productDisplayName: Rockport Men CV Wing Black Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, this CV Wing shoe from rockport makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. UpperLeather upper in a combination of supple and textured panels for styleLacing system for a snug, customised FitadiPRENE inserts in the footbed for a custom fit and impact protectionRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePU midsole with foxing for all day comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
